side_effects.description: Mixing at higher concentrations causes pain that lasts for days at injection sites

protocol_notes: Mixed 5mg GHK-Cu with 15 units (500mcg) BPC-157, then diluted with 1.5 units of bac water for total of 4 units. This dilution reduces injection site pain significantly. Reported 'day 30 of this cycle going well'. Initial recommended 2mg dose of GHK-Cu produced no results; increased to 10mg and found better results. Notes that GHK-Cu is 14% copper; 10mg injection = 1.4mg copper. Daily copper limit is 10mg, so would need ~80mg/day to exceed limit. Ran bloodwork showing no copper toxicity issues at 5mg 2x daily for 2 months without zinc supplement.
